title: BlockParty
description: Mode for people with slight color weakness
body:
### Adds textures for colored concrete and clay to better distinguish it from other colors.
![An overview of colored blocks if the pack is enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zqkrPGqk/images/fe6932e9d3c2d0c50912c81611046f14ed81c501.png)
You can use [this client mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockpartymod) to automatically enable and disable the resource pack when you join a blockparty server.
